Currently living on Lindenrun Path, Arina Kassymova is a notable expert in Sustainable Architecture. She was honored with the Frostcliff Tribute for her significant achievements within the industry. Arina also authored the Duskthread Expansion Index, providing crucial insights into sustainable design methodologies. As a member of the Jasper Tower Ringers, she participates in collaborative efforts to enhance community sustainability. Through her work and community involvement, Arina continues to inspire and implement positive change in architecture.
